name: US Law MCP Server
what_it_does: MCP server for querying US federal law databases — the United States Code, federal regulations, and legislative documents from official US government sources. Enables AI agents to search and retrieve US statutory law, CFR regulations, and congressional records for legal research and compliance workflows.
use_cases: Searching US federal statutes and code from AI legal research agents
Retrieving Code of Federal Regulations (CFR) for compliance analysis agents
Querying US legislative history and congressional records for legal research
Building US law compliance checking workflows using AI agents
not_for: Replacing qualified legal counsel (informational research tool)
best_when: A US legal tech developer, compliance team, or researcher wants AI agents to search and retrieve US federal statutes and regulations from official government databases.
avoid_when: You need state law, international law, or non-US jurisdictions. Also: Ansvar-Systems is a niche developer — verify server maintenance status.

auth.notes: No authentication required — accesses public US government legal databases (govinfo.gov, uscode.house.gov, etc.).

pricing.free_tier_limits: Free — US government legal databases are public
pricing.notes: US federal law databases are freely publicly available. MCP server is free open source.

performance.rate_limits: US government APIs have informal rate limits — respect with reasonable delays

known_agent_gotchas: US government APIs can be slow and occasionally rate-limit automated queries
Legal text is dense and may require specialized parsing for agent consumption
Niche developer (Ansvar-Systems) — verify server maintenance and reliability
Not a substitute for professional legal advice — informational research tool only
agent_readiness.security_notes: Public legal data — no sensitive information. US government servers. HTTPS.

security_score_components.security_notes: Public legal data. Government servers. HTTPS. No sensitive data concerns.
